source:
Voice memo, 0:47, recorded 6:14am, half-asleep:

"Oh — okay so the BookFactory and the MomentFactory are the same shape. They're both — they're both pipelines where one persona has veto power. The CEO in BookFactory, the SignificanceFilter in MomentFactory. The veto persona is what makes the pipeline more than a chain. It's what makes it a... a society. Yeah. Society of agents. With one persona who can say no. That's the missing word. Society. Not pipeline. Pipelines don't have politics. Societies do."
